# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.143 — Other Vehicles

An owner may not register the following vehicles for operation on a public highway:

    (1) power sweepers;

    (2) motorized mobility devices;

    (3) electric personal assistive mobility devices; and

    (4) electric bicycles, as defined by Section 664.001 (Definitions) .

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Transportation Code, Section 502.0073 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 102, eff. January 1, 2012.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 485 (H.B.2188), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.*
